text: What feeling has visited me most often today?
followUp: Where did I notice it in my body?

text: What did I need more of today: rest, kindness, or courage?
followUp: What is one tiny way I can offer that to myself tonight?

text: If today had a weather pattern, what would it be?
followUp: What changed the weather, even briefly?

text: Which story about myself felt loud today, and is it fully true?
followUp: What softer, truer version might also belong?

text: When did I perform today, instead of being honest?
followUp: What was I hoping to protect?

text: What part of me felt unseen today?
followUp: How can I make room for that part tomorrow?

text: What truth have I been postponing because it may change my life?
followUp: What is one safe first step toward it?

text: If I trusted myself 10% more, what would I do next?
followUp: What fear would that action challenge?

text: What am I outgrowing right now?
followUp: How would it feel to release it with gratitude?

text: Who made my day lighter, even in a small way?
followUp: How can I show appreciation this week?

text: Where did I feel connected today?
followUp: What helped that connection feel safe?

text: What conversation felt nourishing today?
followUp: What made it different from usual?

text: What boundary did I honor or ignore today?
followUp: What did that boundary reveal about my needs?

text: Where did I assume instead of asking?
followUp: What question could open clarity?

text: What pattern repeats in my close relationships?
followUp: What might this pattern be trying to teach me?

text: What hard conversation would strengthen trust if handled gently?
followUp: What intention do I want to carry into it?

text: Where am I asking others to meet a need I have not named?
followUp: How can I express that need clearly?

text: Who do I want to forgive, including myself?
followUp: What would forgiveness make possible?

text: What task gave me quiet satisfaction today?
followUp: What strengths did I use while doing it?

text: When did I feel focused today?
followUp: What conditions helped me concentrate?

text: What progress did I make, however small?
followUp: How can I celebrate progress over perfection?

text: What part of my work feels meaningful right now?
followUp: How can I spend more time there this week?

text: What drains me at work, and what boundary could help?
followUp: What is one realistic boundary I can test?

text: Where am I measuring worth by productivity?
followUp: What healthier metric can I choose?

text: If fear of judgment disappeared, what would I create?
followUp: What tiny prototype could I start this week?

text: What am I saying yes to that should be a no?
followUp: How can I decline with clarity and care?

text: What would a deeply aligned work-life season look like?
followUp: Which current habit does that vision ask me to shift?

text: How is my body asking for care today?
followUp: What is one kind response I can offer?

text: When did I feel most physically at ease?
followUp: Can I recreate one part of that moment tomorrow?

text: What sensation keeps showing up for me today?
followUp: What might it be signaling?

text: What tension am I carrying that does not belong to this moment?
followUp: How could I release even 5% of it now?

text: How do I treat my body when I feel behind?
followUp: What would compassion look like instead?

text: Which routine supports my nervous system best?
followUp: What helps me return to it consistently?

text: What belief about my body am I ready to unlearn?
followUp: What kinder belief can replace it?

text: If I trusted my body as an ally, what would I change first?
followUp: How can I practice that trust this week?

text: What does vitality mean for me beyond appearance?
followUp: What choice tomorrow aligns with that meaning?

text: What ordinary moment felt quietly beautiful today?
followUp: Why did this moment matter to me?

text: Who or what held me up today?
followUp: How can I acknowledge that support?

text: What made me smile unexpectedly?
followUp: How did that shift my day?

text: What challenge from the past now looks like a teacher?
followUp: What did it quietly grow in me?

text: What am I taking for granted that deserves reverence?
followUp: How can I honor it in action?

text: Where did I notice resilience in myself today?
followUp: What helped me stay steady?

text: What part of my life would I grieve if it vanished tomorrow?
followUp: How can I love it more intentionally now?

text: What gift has pain left me, however small?
followUp: How can I hold that gift without romanticizing the pain?

text: What abundance already exists in my life that I keep overlooking?
followUp: How can I notice it daily?

text: What dream feels quietly alive in me these days?
followUp: What feeds it, even a little?

text: What made me curious today?
followUp: Could that curiosity point somewhere meaningful?

text: If my future self sent a postcard from one year ahead, what would it say?
followUp: What is one line from that postcard I can act on now?

text: What dream have I minimized to stay comfortable?
followUp: What would honoring it look like this month?

text: What fear keeps me from beginning?
followUp: Which part of that fear is protectiveness, not truth?

text: Where does my energy naturally rise when I imagine the future?
followUp: How can I follow that energy this week?

text: If I could not fail, what would I attempt this year?
followUp: What tiny experiment can begin this week?

text: What life am I secretly hoping to build?
followUp: What habit today belongs to that life?

text: What would bravery look like in my creative life right now?
followUp: Who could support me as I practice that bravery?
